We Continued to Talk Aesthetics in the Context of Islamic Thought, City and Cinema at Ibn Haldun Academy

10.05.2023

The second week sessions of the Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars, which was themed "Aesthetics", were held with highly participation on Saturday, May 6, in our campus and online via Zoom.

The program started with the second session of Prof. Dr. Alev Erkilet's seminar titled "City and Aesthetics" then continued with the second session of Vahdettin Işık's "Living in the Islamic City as an Aesthetic Life Space" seminar. After the lunch break, Dr. Hasan Ramazan Yılmaz held the second session of his seminar titled “Aesthetic Origins, Past and Present of Cinema”.

The program, which started with the second sessions of our professors’ seminars continued with Prof. Dr. Mehmet Gormez's conference titled "Word Aesthetics in Islamic Civilization". After the conference, the second week program of Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars was completed.

Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars will continue with the third sessions of the seminars of Prof. Dr. Alev Erkilet, Dr. Vahdettin Işık and Dr.Hasan Ramazan Yılmaz and Prof. Dr. Burhanettin Tatar's conference titled "The Hermeneutic Character of Islamic Aesthetics" on Saturday, May 20.

For more information:

https://ibnhaldunakademi.com
